author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: relu_backward_f32/f64, sigmoid_backward_f32/f64, softmax_backward_f32/f64, log_softmax_f32/f64, log_softmax_backward_f32/f64, abs_backward_f32/f64, clamp_backward_f32/f64. Each requires reading both the forward output and upstream gradient.
